prompts.name: Soft Bedding
prompts.text: Add soft bedding with pillows, blankets, fabric folds, and warm domestic comfort.

prompts.name: Desk Lamp
prompts.text: Add a desk lamp with warm focused light, realistic shade, and cozy working atmosphere.

prompts.name: Stacked Books
prompts.text: Add stacks of books with varied sizes, paper texture, and scholarly detail while avoiding readable text.

prompts.name: Coffee Table
prompts.text: Add a coffee table with small everyday objects, warm surfaces, and believable living-room placement.

prompts.name: Houseplants
prompts.text: Add houseplants with varied leaf shapes, natural placement, and fresh indoor life.

prompts.name: Wall Art
prompts.text: Add framed wall art as abstract or image-based decor without readable text, supporting the room mood.

prompts.name: Rainy Window
prompts.text: Add a rainy window with water streaks, soft exterior blur, and cozy indoor contrast.

prompts.name: Sunlit Curtains
prompts.text: Add curtains glowing softly with daylight, natural folds, and gentle fabric texture.

prompts.name: Floor Cushions
prompts.text: Add floor cushions with soft compression, fabric texture, and relaxed sitting atmosphere.

prompts.name: Vanity Mirror
prompts.text: Add a vanity mirror with soft bulbs, cosmetic objects, and reflective dressing-room detail.

prompts.name: Kitchen Items
prompts.text: Add kitchen items such as bowls, utensils, cutting boards, and jars for believable domestic context.

prompts.name: Shelf Collectibles
prompts.text: Add small shelf collectibles, figures, boxes, or decor as background personality without clutter.

prompts.name: Candle Cluster
prompts.text: Add a cluster of candles with warm flames, wax detail, and soft atmospheric glow.

prompts.name: Fabric Drapes
prompts.text: Add decorative fabric drapes with flowing folds, rich texture, and soft interior elegance.

prompts.name: Window Seat
prompts.text: Add a window seat with cushions, daylight, outside view, and peaceful sitting atmosphere.
